name: Flight School Trainer Detuning
description: You are a Fleet Manager for a drone flight school. The ArduCopter training vehicle needs to be detuned to make it docile for novice pilots. Configure the vehicle parameters in QGroundControl according to the kinematic limits specified in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/training_limits.txt. Export the updated parameter profile to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/novice_profile.params.
